scripts.dev:celery-default: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE='sentiment_server.settings.local'; Set-Location ../sentiment_server; ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m celery -A sentiment_server worker -Q celery -l info -P solo"
scripts.dev:celery-training: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE='sentiment_server.settings.local'; Set-Location ../sentiment_server; ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m celery -A sentiment_server worker -Q training -l info -P solo -n training@%h"
scripts.dev:celery-beat: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE='sentiment_server.settings.local'; Set-Location ../sentiment_server; ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m celery -A sentiment_server beat -l info"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck
